meaning: National Football League,美国国家足球联盟
examples: The jury found that the NFL had violated antitrust laws.
I love watching football — NFL football on TV, especially the Giants.
Like unicorns and an NFL collective bargaining agreement, they don't exist.
Expect the NFL to extend their collective bargaining agreement before the 2006 season starts.
That would destroy the parity that NFL teams have enjoyed the past ten years.
